import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F


def sym_norm_adj(adj):
    adj = adj + torch.eye(adj.size(0), device=adj.device)
    degree = adj.sum(dim=1)
    d_inv_sqrt = torch.pow(degree, -0.5)
    d_inv_sqrt[torch.isinf(d_inv_sqrt)] = 0.0
    D_inv_sqrt = torch.diag(d_inv_sqrt)
    return D_inv_sqrt @ adj @ D_inv_sqrt


class DilatedCausalConv(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, in_ch, out_ch, kernel_size=2, dilation=1):
        super().__init__()
        self.padding = (kernel_size - 1) * dilation
        self.conv = nn.Conv2d(in_ch, out_ch, (kernel_size, 1), dilation=(dilation, 1))

    def forward(self, x):
        x = F.pad(x, (0, 0, self.padding, 0))
        return self.conv(x)


class GatedTCN(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, in_ch, out_ch, kernel_size=2, dilation=1, dropout=0.1):
        super().__init__()
        self.filter_conv = DilatedCausalConv(in_ch, out_ch, kernel_size, dilation)
        self.gate_conv = DilatedCausalConv(in_ch, out_ch, kernel_size, dilation)
        self.bn = nn.BatchNorm2d(out_ch)
        self.dropout = nn.Dropout(dropout)

    def forward(self, x):
        filter_out = torch.tanh(self.filter_conv(x))
        gate = torch.sigmoid(self.gate_conv(x))
        return self.dropout(self.bn(filter_out * gate))


class GraphConv(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, in_dim, out_dim, num_nodes, K=3, alpha=0.05, adaptive_emb_dim=10):
        super().__init__()
        self.linear1 = nn.Linear(in_dim, in_dim)
        self.linear2 = nn.Linear(in_dim, out_dim)
        self.K = K
        self.alpha = alpha
        self.nodevec1 = nn.Parameter(torch.randn(num_nodes, adaptive_emb_dim))
        self.nodevec2 = nn.Parameter(torch.randn(adaptive_emb_dim, num_nodes))

    def forward(self, x, adj_norm):
        B, C, T, N = x.shape
        x_t = x.permute(0, 2, 3, 1).contiguous()
        h = F.relu(self.linear1(x_t))
        adp = F.softmax(F.relu(torch.mm(self.nodevec1, self.nodevec2)), dim=1)
        combined_adj = adj_norm + adp
        out = h
        for _ in range(self.K):
            out = self.alpha * h + (1 - self.alpha) * torch.einsum('ij,btjd->btid', combined_adj, out)
        out = self.linear2(out)
        return out.permute(0, 3, 1, 2).contiguous()


class STBlock(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, residual_ch, hidden_ch, num_nodes, kernel_size=2, dilation=1,
                 graph_K=3, graph_alpha=0.05, adaptive_emb_dim=10, dropout=0.1):
        super().__init__()
        self.tcn1 = GatedTCN(residual_ch, hidden_ch, kernel_size, dilation, dropout)
        self.graph_conv = GraphConv(hidden_ch, hidden_ch, num_nodes, graph_K, graph_alpha, adaptive_emb_dim)
        self.tcn2 = GatedTCN(hidden_ch, hidden_ch, kernel_size, 1, dropout)
        self.residual_conv = nn.Conv2d(hidden_ch, residual_ch, (1, 1)) if residual_ch != hidden_ch else nn.Identity()
        self.skip_conv = nn.Conv2d(hidden_ch, hidden_ch, (1, 1))

    def forward(self, x, adj_norm):
        residual = x
        x = self.tcn1(x)
        x = self.graph_conv(x, adj_norm)
        x = self.tcn2(x)
        s = self.skip_conv(x)
        x = self.residual_conv(x) + residual
        return x, s


class GWNet(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, adj_mx, seq_len=12, pred_len=12, num_nodes=207,
                 hidden_dim=64, num_layers=4, kernel_size=2,
                 graph_K=3, graph_alpha=0.05, adaptive_emb_dim=10, dropout=0.3,
                 use_revin=True):
        super().__init__()
        self.seq_len = seq_len
        self.pred_len = pred_len
        self.num_nodes = num_nodes
        self.hidden_dim = hidden_dim
        self.num_layers = num_layers
        self.use_revin = use_revin

        adj_norm = sym_norm_adj(adj_mx)
        self.register_buffer('adj_norm', adj_norm)

        if use_revin:
            self.affine_weight = nn.Parameter(torch.ones(1, 1, num_nodes))
            self.affine_bias = nn.Parameter(torch.zeros(1, 1, num_nodes))

        self.input_conv = nn.Conv2d(1, hidden_dim, (1, 1))

        self.st_blocks = nn.ModuleList()
        for i in range(num_layers):
            dilation = 2 ** i
            self.st_blocks.append(
                STBlock(hidden_dim, hidden_dim, num_nodes, kernel_size, dilation,
                        graph_K, graph_alpha, adaptive_emb_dim, dropout)
            )

        self.output_conv = nn.Conv2d(hidden_dim * num_layers, pred_len, (1, 1))

    def forward(self, x):
        # x: [B, T, N]
        if self.use_revin:
            mean_in = x.mean(dim=1, keepdim=True)  # [B, 1, N]
            std_in = x.std(dim=1, keepdim=True)  # [B, 1, N]
            std_in = torch.clamp(std_in, min=1e-5)
            x = (x - mean_in) / std_in
            x = x * self.affine_weight + self.affine_bias

        x = x.unsqueeze(1)  # [B, 1, T, N]
        x = self.input_conv(x)  # [B, hidden_dim, T, N]

        skip_connections = []
        for block in self.st_blocks:
            x, skip = block(x, self.adj_norm)
            skip_connections.append(skip)

        skip_out = torch.cat(skip_connections, dim=1)
        out = skip_out[:, :, -1:, :]  # [B, hidden_dim*num_layers, 1, N]
        out = self.output_conv(out)  # [B, pred_len, 1, N]
        out = out.squeeze(2)  # [B, pred_len, N]

        if self.use_revin:
            out = (out - self.affine_bias) / (self.affine_weight + 1e-5)
            out = out * std_in + mean_in

        return out
